desc: In the real klona deep-clone library (src/index.js), the Map branch copies each entry's VALUE by reference instead of recursively cloning it: klona(new Map([['a', {n:1}]])) returns a Map whose value is the SAME object as the original, so mutating the clone mutates the source. Fix the single call in the Map branch so the value is deep-cloned and tests/klona.test.ts passes.
